name: Melanie Stevenson's Woodlands Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Bell pepper - green or red, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix eggs, breadcrumbs, onion, V8 juice, green bell pepper, and seasonings until well combined.
2. Gradually add meat to the mixture, 1/4 pound at a time, mixing until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Shape the mixture into two round loaves and place two strips of bacon in an X across each loaf.
4. Place the meatloaf on a rack in a roasting pan and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. This is a healthy meatloaf, as baking the loaves on a rack allows the fat to drain off, reducing calories.
